prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约5497→5788→6607→5981→4018名，整体呈先降后升走势。2021至2023年位次逐年后移，2024年略有回升，2025年大幅前 移至4018名，较2024年前移约1963名，反映出该校在陕西理科考生中的报考热度显著上升；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划2021年58人、2022年63人、2023 年54人、2024年68人、2025年85人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划74人，较2025年减少11人（缩招约12.9%），缩招将加剧竞争，使最低位次趋于前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985、211、双一流高校，2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第12位（哈工大整体），属全国顶尖工科院校；威海校区与本部共享学科资源与毕业证书，办学层次与声 誉均处于国内第一梯队；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高；202 4年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年位次大幅前移表明热度已回升；哈工大（本部）第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达17个，包括力学A+、机械工 程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、软件工程A等，威海校区招生专业覆盖计算机类、电子信息、自动化、机器人工程、软件 工程等核心工科方向，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；陕西2026年物理类考 生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生规模大幅增长将推高整体竞争烈度；该校位于山东威海，非 本省高校，无本地招生偏好优势；在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年缩 招约12.9%加剧竞争、陕西物理类考生增加约19.7%推高整体竞争烈度，以及学校顶尖层次与高热专业吸引力的多重作用，预计2026年最低位次；预测最低位次约3756名，区间3328–4184名。

- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）。

- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3328–4184名内，建议以二档工科试验班（未来信息/软件工程）为主攻方向，一档拔尖班作为冲刺目标，三档卓越优才计划作为保底选择；位次明显优于区间下 限（3328名以内）可重点冲击一档AI加先进技术领军班或机器人与智能装备拔尖班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5497 → 5788 → 6607 → 5981 → 4018, showing an overall trend of first decreasing and then increasing. Rankings moved back year by year from 2021 to 2023, slightly recovered in 2024, and significantly moved forward to 4018 in 2025, about 1963 places ahead of 2024, reflecting a notable increase in application popularity among Shaanxi science candidates. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 58 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 54 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 85 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 11 (about 12.9% reduction) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and tend to move the minimum ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (overall HIT), belonging to the top-tier engineering institutions in China. The Weihai campus shares disciplinary resources and graduation certificates with the main campus, with its educational level and reputation in the domestic first tier. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (medium attention), but the significant forward movement in rankings in 2025 indicates a rebound in popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, HIT (main campus) had 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc. The Weihai campus covers core engineering directions such as computer science, electronic information, automation, robotics engineering, and software engineering, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025. The significant growth in candidate numbers will raise overall competition intensity. The university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not a local university in the province, so there is no advantage in local enrollment preference. The enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of significant forward movement in rankings in 2025, the intensification of competition due to an enrollment reduction of about 12.9% in 2026, the increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates by about 19.7% raising overall competition intensity, and the combined effect of the university's top-tier level and high-heat major attractiveness, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3756, with a range of 3328–4184.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Advanced Technology Leading Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, etc.)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Plan) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellent Talent Plan) (Intelligent Construction, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Bioengineering, etc.)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Related Direction of Excellent Talent Plan)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3328–4184, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information/Software Engineering) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 top classes as a sprint target, and use Tier 3 Excellent Talent Plan as a safety choice. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3328), focus on impacting Tier 1 AI and Advanced Technology Leading Class or Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The university only has admission data for liberal arts in Shaanxi in 2023, with a minimum ranking of approximately 1203.
